headline: Top Ten Billionaires Have Lost Nearly $150 Billion In 2022: Who Lost The Most And The Single Gainer
summary: An index that tracks how much the richest people in the world are worth paints a grim picture of how the beginning of 2022 has fared for the most wealthy.

headline: Missed Out On The Lucid Air Dream Edition? You Can Get One On eBay, But It'll Cost You
summary: One of the most anticipated electric vehicles started deliveries in October 2021. If you missed out on securing one of the 520 Lucid Air Dream Editions being made, there are now three for sale on eBay Inc (NASDAQ: EBAY).

headline: Polestar Enters South Korean Market And Already Has 4,000 Reservations: What Investors Should Know
summary: A leading electric vehicle company set to go public via SPAC merger has shared figures from its newest launched country.

headline: Netflix Dominates Nielsen Top Ten List For Streaming Hours, But 'Encanto' Makes A Big Debut For Disney
summary: A list put out by research firm Nielsen Holdings (NYSE: NLSN) showed how many hours were streamed of top shows and movies on major streaming platforms for the week of Dec. 27, 2021 through Jan. 2, 2022.

headline: Apple Sparks Controversy With Pregnant Man Emoji On iPhone
summary:
Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) has introduced a pregnant man emoji and pregnant person emoji with its iOS 15.4 beta version.

The pregnant emoji isn’t new to some, as they’re part of a September 2021 update to the “encyclopedia of emoji” Emojipedia.

headline: Will Netflix Recover Its Mojo Anytime Soon? This Analysts Has Some Doubts
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Mike Khouw of Optimize Advisors said that Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) has been “one of the market’s darlings and leaders for a long time.&rdq

headline: Karaoke In Your Tesla Vehicle? Yes, But Only Being Offered In This Country So Far
summary: Full self-driving is expected to hit Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) vehicles by the end of 2022, according to CEO Elon Musk.

headline: 'Spider-Man: No Way Home' Keeps Control Of US Box Office
summary: “Spider-Man: No Way Out” took the top ranking in the U.S. box office chart for the sixth time in seven weeks, with $10.4 million in ticket sales from 3,675 screens.

headline: MrBeast Has A New Chocolate Bar; YouTube Star Teams With Walmart On New Feastables Snack Food Line
summary: YouTube cut-up MrBeast is teaming with Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) on a new snack food line designed to offer healthier alternatives for the in-between-meals crowd.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Netflix, Robinhood, Shopify, Visa And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story says investors are rushing to adapt to a turbulent year ahead, after the worst January since 2008.
	Other featured articles discuss why a streaming giant is ready for a comeback and concerns about the future of an online brokerage.

headline: 'Fear Of Getting Run Over' Causing Tesla Shares To Drop After 'Impressive Results' : Analyst
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) shares fell about 12% Thursday in reaction to the EV maker's  fourth-quarter results.
